reasoning: The anomalies first appeared on the A1/E2 interfaces, showing a significant spike in packet loss and latency. The instability of the control interfaces directly impacted the gNB (base station), which relies on these interfaces for RRM and configuration updates from the RIC. The degradation of the gNB then caused anomalies in UE connectivity and performance drops in the Core Network functions.
actionable_steps: Inspect the A1/E2 interface configuration and hardware, check for congestion or hardware failure on the RIC and gNB endpoints, and verify the same for the Core Network and UE connectivity.
